latin: Vir brevis et callidus, quotiens consilium eius frustrabatur, idem verbum clamabat: 'fieri non potest!' tandem amicus eius dixit: 'puto te nescire quid hoc verbum significet.'

questions.prompt: What does the short man keep saying?

questions.target: He doesn't know what that word means
choices: He doesn't know what that word means
He should find a new plan
He is using the wrong language

translation: A short and crafty man, whenever his plan was thwarted, kept shouting the same word: 'Inconceivable!' Finally his friend said: 'I think you don't know what that word means.'
